form.formComment: Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 13 at Sha Tin on March 22 over 1800m, 2.5 len behind Shamus Storm with 53.5kg at $5.10. Before that 3rd of 14 at Sha Tin on February 19 over 2000m, 0.8 len behind Gentlemen Legacy with 53.5kg at $6.30. Well placed. Gets Purton back in the saddle now and can make an impression.
